channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 9.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer accuses Elon Musk of trying to ‘whip up division’ in UK over murder of Henry Nowak – UK politics live
item.description: Starmer accuses Elon Musk of trying to ‘whip up division’ in UK over murder of Henry Nowak – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Keir Starmer hits out at Elon Musk for ‘trying to whip up division’ in UK over Henry Nowak’s murder
item.description: Keir Starmer hits out at Elon Musk for ‘trying to whip up division’ in UK over Henry Nowak’s murder

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Boris Johnson described Theresa May as a ‘giant Yucca tree under whose shade everything dies’
item.description: Boris Johnson described Theresa May as a ‘giant Yucca tree under whose shade everything dies’

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I instinctively agree with this but I’m aware that because I now find Question Time unbearable, I have no sense of what Fiona Bruce’s style is like beyond “I hate what this programme is like now”. Could easily just be...
item.description: I instinctively agree with this but I’m aware that because I now find Question Time unbearable, I have no sense of what Fiona Bruce’s style is like beyond “I hate what this programme is like now”. Could easily just be...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Darren Jones told Mandelson he was ‘so sorry’ after sacking over Epstein ties

item.title: BBC Politics: Missing Mandelson messages from minister Darren Jones revealed
item.description: Missing Mandelson messages from minister Darren Jones revealed

item.title: FT UK Politics: Darren Jones told Mandelson he was ‘so sorry’ he was sacked as US envoy
